prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大核心工科专业社会热度持续偏热/高热；湖北物理类考生2025年约249802人，2026年全省普通高考总人数393700人，按近年物理类占比约63%估算约248000人，考生规模基本持平；省控线2025年426分较2024年437分下降11分，但哈工大位次远高于省控线，影响有限；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江，属跨省招生，在湖北无本地倾斜；该校在湖北招生计划近年持续缩减后2026年小幅回弹，整体招生规模较小，对位次敏感度较高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5133 → 4670 → 3160 → 1314 → 1186, showing a continuous and significant upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying year by year). Over the past 4 years, the ranking has moved forward by about 3947 places, with a baseline of approximately 1186 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Physics Category was 77 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 26 in 2025, decreasing year by year. In 2026, the plan is 29, an increase of 3 students (+11.5%) compared to 2025, which provides some relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (up 2 places from 14th in 2025), firmly among the top engineering universities in the country. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention from applicants. In 2024, there was negative public opinion related to a sharp drop in admission cutoffs, but the ranking recovered in 2025, and the impact is fading. It has 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Civil Engineering, with top-tier engineering strength that strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at Harbin Institute of Technology, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be relatively hot/very hot in social popularity. In 2025, there were approximately 249,802 Physics Category candidates in Hubei, and in 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in the province is 393,700. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63%, it is estimated to be around 248,000, with the candidate scale basically stable. The provincial control line in 2025 was 426 points, down 11 points from 437 in 2024, but the ranking of Harbin Institute of Technology is far above the provincial control line, so the impact is limited. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, which is an inter-provincial enrollment, with no local preference in Hubei. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei has been continuously reduced in recent years, with a slight rebound in 2026, but the overall enrollment scale is small, making it highly sensitive to ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous and significant ranking advancement in recent years, the rise in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, the sustained high heat on Douyin reflecting unabated application enthusiasm, and the marginal relief from the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3 students), the ranking is expected to move back slightly (ranking number increases) based on the 2025 baseline of 1186. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1248, with a range of 1106–1390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Brain-Machine Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy)
- Intelligent Medical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1106–1390, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Autonomous Intelligence, Brain-Machine Intelligence, Future Aerospace, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Future Technology Top Talent Class, Academician Special Class, Artificial Intelligence Zhongguancun Class) as a sprint target. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1106), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. Tier 3 majors serve as a safe backup. Harbin Institute of Technology has top-tier engineering strength, and the flexible selection mechanism within major categories allows you to choose engineering directions that match your interests.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2339 → 1695 → 1786, with significant fluctuations in the past three years. In 2024, the ranking moved forward substantially, followed by a slight backward shift in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1786. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei was 9 students in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 9 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 8 students, a reduction of 1 student (-11.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking. Although it is strong in science and engineering, as a top C9 university, it still has strong brand appeal for liberal arts students. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed. On Douyin, it ranks 10th in overall popularity (high heat), with high overall exposure, which also boosts applications for liberal arts majors. Harbin Institute of Technology is primarily engineering-focused, and its History Category enrollment majors are mainly the Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, etc.), corresponding to Management Science and Engineering (A) and Business Administration (not individually rated), with relatively strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economics and Management majors is divided and cautious, but liberal arts students highly recognize the 985 platform. In 2025, the number of History Category examinees in Hubei was approximately 141,436. For 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination students in the province is 393,700. Based on the recent proportion of History Category students at about 37%, it is estimated to be around 145,700, a slight increase. The provincial control line in 2025 was 442 points, up 10 points from 432 points in 2024, indicating slightly intensified competition. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, which is a cross-province enrollment, with a very small enrollment scale in Hubei's History Category (8–12 students), making rankings sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the reduction of 1 student in 2026, a slight increase in the number of History Category examinees, and the rise in the provincial control line, based on the 2025 baseline of 1786, the ranking is expected to move forward slightly (the ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1652, with a range of 1464–1840.
